title: WallJumpVS
description: Fork of WallJumpTXF with Valkyrien Skies support!
body:
# ⚠️ Fork Information & Credits

## **This project is an unofficial fork of** [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wall-jump-txf](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wall-jump-txf).

- Original Project: Wall-Jump! [TXF] on CurseForge
- Original Author: jahirtrap (and genandnic for the original concept)
- License: This fork is created under the terms of the original project's license.

## 🛠️ How this Fork Differs (Valkyrien Skies Support)

The standard Wall-Jump mod relies on static world collision, meaning it does not detect walls on moving physics entities. This fork specifically adds compatibility for Valkyrien Skies (currently only supports version 2.3).

- Added Feature: You can now wall-jump and wall-cling on Valkyrien Skies Ships!
- Physics Integration: The collision logic has been updated to account for ship grids, allowing parkour mechanics to function even while the ship is moving or rotating.
## Mod Description

WallJumpVS is a movement enhancement mod for Minecraft 1.20.1, optimized for modpacks that use Valkyrien Skies. It retains all the features of the original Wall-Jump! [TXF] mod, but fixes the inability to wall jump off of blocks on a ship.

## Key Features:

Wall Jump: Press jump while clinging to a wall to launch yourself up.

Wall Cling: Hold the wall cling key while against a wall to slide down slowly.
Double Jump: Press jump in mid-air for an extra boost.
Ship Parkour: Fully functional movement on VS ships.

## Requirements:

Minecraft 1.20.1
Forge
Valkyrien Skies (Required for the physics functionality)
